title: HarvestEXP
body:
![Resource Header](https://norska.dev/resources/hexp/resource_header.png)

## Features
### General
- Option to drop only if ripe & naturally grown.
- Drop via block (for mending) or spawn experience.
- Permissions to gain experience for each crop.
- Blacklist worlds where experience won't drop.

### Quality of Life Features
- Select how to display numbers (e.g 10000 can be shown as 10,000 or 10k).
​

###  Norska Development Resource Quality
- Auto-updating configurations on plugin updates.
- Fully customizable messages including chat (option to auto-center), actionbars, and titles. (RGB Support)
- Fully customizable sounds (option for power and pitch), for every command and event.
- Use any PlaceholderAPI placeholder in plugin messages.

## Gallery

![](https://norska.dev/resources/hexp/showcase.png)

## YouTube Video
[![YouTube](https://img.youtube.com/vi/SxehK-OOGR8/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SxehK-OOGR8)

## Default configurations
- View the default config file [here](https://norska.dev/resources/hexp/defaultconfig)!
- View the default messages file [here](https://norska.dev/resources/hexp/defaultmessages)!

## Developer API 
- Information about the available Developer API can be found [here](https://norska.dev/docs/free/hexp/api)

*Notes: Folia is supported from version 2024.05 and later.
